untranslatable_reason: Advance Block pattern requires analysis of three consecutive candles with specific gap and close characteristics. The pattern detection logic (bearish gaps at open followed by bullish closes across 3 bars) cannot be fully expressed using only single-bar indicators and the allowed operators. A proper implementation requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic that checks: candle[i].close > candle[i].open AND candle[i].open < candle[i-1].close AND candle[i+1].open < candle[i].close, etc. This requires array indexing or pattern-matching capabilities beyond the current constraint set.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the essence with individual white candle and gap conditions, but the three-candle sequential pattern with specific gap relationships cannot be accurately represented. The signal is direction-agnostic (bullish continuation in both bull and bear markets) and requires specialized candlestick pattern recognition.
